# Purchase Analytic

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:29e780dfe7855cc5a36aa1348802e5d1035bffb39eb3825103ed2a4fa61f4ada
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

The goal of this module is to ease analytic distribution management on purchase order.
This module add analytic distribution on purchase order.

If all lines of the purchase order have the same analytic distribution, the analytic distribution on the purchase order is automatically set with this value.
If a analytic distribution is set on the purchase order, all lines of the purchase will take this value.


Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/account-analytic/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/account-analytic/issues/new?body=module:%20purchase_analytic%0Aversion:%2016.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

methods.name: odoo.addons.purchase_analytic.models.purchase.PurchaseOrder._compute_analytic_distribution
documentation:
If all order line have same analytic distribution set analytic_distribution.
If no lines, respect value given by the user.

methods.name: odoo.addons.purchase_analytic.models.purchase.PurchaseOrder._inverse_analytic_distribution
documentation: When set analytic_distribution set analytic distribution on all order lines

methods.name: odoo.addons.purchase_analytic.models.purchase.PurchaseOrder._onchange_analytic_distribution
